method: agent-browser (headless Chromium, --session nebius) rendered the public Token Factory model catalog (JS SPA at tokenfactory.nebius.com/models, redirects to /endpoints) and read document.body.innerText. Parsed each card's In/Out USD per 1M tokens (Base tier), and served region. Anonymous header showed All 25 / Private 0 / Public 25. Embedding model (Qwen3-Embedding-8B, $0.01/1M In only, no output price) omitted. region:'eu' set only for eu-north1-served models; us-central1-served flagged region:'us', uk-south1-served flagged region:'uk', with the raw served region kept in notes. Change vs 2026-06-23: catalog grew 24->25 with Kimi-K2.7-Code (us-central1, New). GLM-5.2 still serves from us-central1 (moved off eu-north1 on 2026-06-18). Kimi-K2.6 now flagged Vision. All Base-tier prices unchanged from 2026-06-23.

models.notes: tier: Base; served region: us-central1; tag: New; id Kimi-K2.7-Code; code-focused reasoning/agentic; NEW endpoint vs 2026-06-23 (catalog 24->25)
